title: Enable --rm with --detach
body: We can now safely remove detached containers as --rm handling has moved into the cleanup process.

comments.body: Hold for a second, more commits coming. Found some bugs while prepping for demo.
Alright, there we go. Fixed a few bugs in `podman start` I noticed during demo prep.
